rulings.Case Title: DOMENIC J CANNIZZARO et al VS. FRED P RICHARD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 2, 2014, line 1. INTERVENOR ROBERT RICHARD II's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT Sustained with leave to amend to allege in good faith fact showing that each cause of action is not barred by statute of limitations; to allege facts supporting each element of conspiracy; and to explain inconsistencies with prior pleadings. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CONSTANCE BOURGES VS. DANY SCHER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 2, 2014, line 2. PLAINTIFF CONSTANCE BOURGES' MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 1008 and CCP 473(b). Additionally, CCP 1008 is not available as judgment has been entered. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 55 DOLORES STREET LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. SARAH E. BRANT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 2, 2014, line 8. DEFENDANT SARAH BRANT's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint DENIED. Hearing Required to address possible conflict. Complaint states a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Whether or not 55 Dolores Street, LLC complied wit the corporate formalities in executing documents required by Ellis Act is an issue of fact that cannot be properly addressed on a motion to quash. = (501/REQ)
